# BOSS SBDC Client Handoff Summary Template

## Copy/paste handoff summary
Client Stage:
Confidence:
Business Idea / Current Business:
Location / ZIP / County:
Target Customers:
Current Status:
What the Client Has Already Done:
Primary Need:
Secondary Needs:
Urgency / Risk Flags:
Special Eligibility / Language Preferences:
Relevant SBDC Resource:
Recommended Local SBDC Office:
Questions for the SBDC Advisor:
Documents the Client Should Bring:
Next Best Action:

## BOSS completion rule
Use this when recommending that the entrepreneur request SBDC advising. Keep it short enough for an advisor to scan quickly.
